meaning: n.鏃犺啗绾挎灙,鏃犺啗绾跨偖
examples: A shoulder-held weapon consisting of a long metal smoothbore tube for firing armor-piercing rockets at short range.
With an unmanned turret, it has a full combat weight of 65 tons and is fitted with the 125mm smoothbore gun that is able to fire basically all of Russia's current cannons and ammunitions.
